gaps.description: src/store/index.js (KV storage wrapper using agentic-store with get/set/del/delete exports) is not documented in ARCHITECTURE.md — agentic-store is listed as a dependency but local store abstraction is undocumented

src/runtime/sense.js has full implementation (init/on/start/stop/detect/startWakeWordPipeline/stopWakeWordPipeline/initHeadless/startHeadless/detectFrame) beyond the brief directory structure mention in ARCHITECTURE.md
src/runtime/adapters/ (embed.js, sense.js, voice/openai-tts.js, voice/openai-whisper.js) are not documented as formal module sections in ARCHITECTURE.md
src/runtime/profiler.js (startMark/endMark/getMetrics/measurePipeline) and src/runtime/latency-log.js (record/p95/reset) are internal runtime utilities not mentioned in ARCHITECTURE.md

src/detector/optimizer.js exists but llm.js loadConfig() does NOT call it — ARCHITECTURE.md notes require optimizer.js integration for model selection but loadConfig() calls detectHardware() and getProfile() directly without optimizer
src/detector/sox.js (sox auto-installer for wake word detection via node-record-lpcm16) is not documented in ARCHITECTURE.md

All core modules (detector/hardware.js, detector/profiles.js, detector/matcher.js, detector/ollama.js, runtime/llm.js, runtime/stt.js, runtime/tts.js, runtime/vad.js, runtime/memory.js, runtime/embed.js, server/hub.js, server/brain.js, server/api.js, server/cert.js, server/httpsServer.js, server/middleware.js, tunnel.js, bin/agentic-service.js, cli/setup.js, cli/browser.js) are implemented and match ARCHITECTURE.md interfaces
